creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text: qtile pulls in xpyb separately, so the change isn't needed for qtile. And qtile is marked for removal due to not running. Further, xpyb doesn't work with newer xcb-proto (1.13), is marked BROKEN and hasn't seen a release in 6 years. Gentoo removed it, I think we should probably do the same eventually and probably will. Closing this for now.
